'''gazhopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ynambu|ynambu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ynambu|ynambu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazhopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzhepeth|gæzhepeth]] || [[word:gæzhepej|gæzhepej]] || [[word:gæzhepesh|gæzhepesh]] || [[word:gæzhepe|gæzhepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhozhopoth|gazhozhopoth]] || [[word:gazhozhopoj|gazhozhopoj]] || [[word:gazhozhoposh|gazhozhoposh]] || [[word:gazhozhopo|gazhozhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhopoth|gazhopoth]] || [[word:gazhopoj|gazhopoj]] || [[word:gazhoposh|gazhoposh]] || [[word:gazhopo|gazhopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhofpoth|gazhofpoth]] || [[word:gazhofpoj|gazhofpoj]] || [[word:gazhofposh|gazhofposh]] || [[word:gazhofpof|gazhofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhopotho|gazhopotho]] || [[word:gazhopojo|gazhopojo]] || [[word:gazhoposho|gazhoposho]] || [[word:gazhopoko|gazhopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhopoth|gazhopoth]] || [[word:gazhopoj|gazhopoj]] || [[word:gazhoposh|gazhoposh]] || [[word:gazhopo|gazhopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhopothol|gazhopothol]] || [[word:gazhopojol|gazhopojol]] || [[word:gazhoposhol|gazhoposhol]] || [[word:gazhopokol|gazhopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhopothotho|gazhopothotho]] || [[word:gazhopojojo|gazhopojojo]] || [[word:gazhoposhosho|gazhoposhosho]] || [[word:gazhopoko|gazhopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhopothon|gazhopothon]] || [[word:gazhopojon|gazhopojon]] || [[word:gazhoposhon|gazhoposhon]] || [[word:gazhopokon|gazhopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhopothoro|gazhopothoro]] || [[word:gazhopojoro|gazhopojoro]] || [[word:gazhoposhoro|gazhoposhoro]] || [[word:gazhopokoro|gazhopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
